tagline: Santa Rosa's plastering and stucco specialists since 1978
seoDescription: Gaitan Plastering in Santa Rosa, CA — stucco, interior and exterior plaster, lath, and architectural foam shapes. Family-run craftsmanship since 1978.
heroHeading: Stucco and plaster done right, the first time
heroSubheading: A Santa Rosa family trade since 1978 — exterior stucco, interior plaster, lath, and architectural foam detailing for homes and commercial buildings across Sonoma County.
highlights: Serving Santa Rosa and Sonoma County
aboutBody: Owner Joe Gaitan has worked in the plastering trade since 1978, and Gaitan Plastering has built its reputation on Santa Rosa Avenue as a go-to source for high-quality stucco and plaster work across Northern California.

The company handles both residential and commercial projects, from full exterior stucco systems and interior plaster to lath and custom architectural foam detailing — decorative columns, foam sills, window and door trim, and other precut shapes that give a building its character. It's a fully licensed, BBB-accredited business with an A+ rating.

services.title: Exterior Stucco
services.description: Complete stucco systems for new builds and remodels — scratch, brown, and color/finish coats applied for a durable, weather-tight exterior.

services.title: Interior Plastering
services.description: Smooth and textured interior plaster for residential and commercial walls and ceilings, finished to match the look you want.

services.title: Lath & Base Coats
services.description: Proper lath and base-coat preparation that gives stucco and plaster a sound, long-lasting foundation.

services.title: Architectural Foam Shapes
services.description: Custom EPS foam detailing — decorative columns, foam sills, chimney caps, posts, and precut window and door trim to add architectural character.

services.title: Plaster & Stucco Repair
services.description: Patching and repair of cracked, damaged, or aging stucco and plaster, blended to match existing wall finishes.

services.title: Commercial Plastering
services.description: Plaster and stucco work for commercial buildings, handled by an experienced licensed crew.

testimonials.quote: Gaitan Plastering produces some of the highest quality work in Northern California. His company is one of a handful of plastering contractors that I highly recommend.
testimonials.author: Industry colleague

notes:
VERIFIED FACTS (high confidence): Owner Joe Gaitan; business operates as 'Gaitan Plastering' / 'Gaitan Plastering & Architectural' (LinkedIn) and is registered as 'Joe Gaitan Plastering, Inc.' Located 3237 Santa Rosa Ave, Santa Rosa, CA 95407, Sonoma County. Phone (707) 566-9118. Joe Gaitan has been in the plastering trade since 1978 (used as 'established'). CSLB contractor license #1037501, classification C-35 (Lathing & Plastering), expiration 3/31/2026 (per BBB; INCLUDE in copy, but re-verify status directly on CSLB before sending — CSLB Check-A-License blocked automated fetch here). BBB Accredited since 4/5/2015 with an A+ rating. Services confirmed across BBB/Blue Book/Yelp: stucco, residential & commercial plastering, and architectural foam shapes (decorative foam columns, foam sills, chimney caps, posts, door/window trim, precut decorative foam shapes); interior plaster, lath, and color/finish coats are standard C-35 work inferred from the classification. Listed in the Blue Book since 2002. TESTIMONIAL is a real published quote (appears to be a peer/industry endorsement rather than a named retail customer — attributed generically; verify/replace before send if a named customer quote is preferred). No Yelp/Google star rating could be read (pages 403-blocked). 

TIDAL WAVE / EMAIL MISMATCH: The contact email tidalwavepoolandspa@gmail.com could NOT be linked to Gaitan Plastering by any source. No 'Tidal Wave Pool and Spa' business was found in Santa Rosa, CA (only an unrelated Tidal Wave Pool & Spa in El Paso, TX). It is PLAUSIBLE the same owner also does pool plastering/replastering (a common adjacent service for a C-35 plasterer) and uses a pool-branded Gmail — but this is UNVERIFIED. Treating cautiously: did NOT add pool plastering as a headline service, left all social blank, and flag that the email/business pairing should be human-confirmed before any outreach email is sent to that address. Do not assert a pool business exists. 

PHOTOS: Website gaitanplastering.com (incl. /samples/samples.html) returned 403 to automated fetch — treated as dead/unusable; no real photos captured, realPhotoUrls left empty. Sources: BBB (bbb.org/.../gaitan-plastering-1116-25726), Yelp listing, The Blue Book ProView, BuildZoom, Procore, LinkedIn (Joe Gaitan).
